title: leucanthemum lacustre
intro: Leucanthemum lacustre is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Leucanthemum lacustre include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and boosting the immune system. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
